summary.zh: 比较循环方向、次数、暂停和节奏，避免持续动态干扰阅读。
summary.en: Compare loop direction, count, pauses, and rhythm while controlling distraction.

definition.zh: 按指定次数或无限重复播放的动画。
definition.en: A timeline restarts according to a finite iteration count or continues indefinitely.

description.zh: 控制完整循环的节奏；持续动态需要支持暂停并保持低干扰。
description.en: Controls the rhythm of one full cycle; continuous motion should stay pausable and low-distraction.

purpose.zh: 控制重复方向、次数和停顿，让循环传达活性或等待，同时限制干扰。
purpose.en: Control repeat direction, count, and pauses so loops communicate activity or waiting with limited distraction.

frequency.zh: 仅在状态持续期间运行；普通内容避免永久循环。
frequency.en: Run only while the underlying state persists and avoid permanent loops in ordinary content.

trigger.zh: 由加载、直播、演示或显式播放状态触发，离开视口时暂停。
trigger.en: Trigger from loading, live, demo, or explicit play state, pausing when offscreen.

enterExit.zh: 每轮结束在稳定帧停顿；状态结束时完成当前短阶段或立即收敛。
enterExit.en: Pause on a stable frame between iterations and settle promptly when the state ends.

interruptibility.zh: 暂停后从当前进度恢复；状态改变时取消旧循环并清理计时器。
interruptibility.en: Resume from current progress after pause and cancel old loops with timer cleanup on state changes.

gestureRules.zh: 悬停、聚焦和用户控制可暂停；播放控件支持键盘和辅助技术。
gestureRules.en: Allow hover, focus, and user controls to pause, with keyboard and assistive-technology support.

reducedMotion.zh: 停止自动循环，显示代表性静态帧和明确状态文本。
reducedMotion.en: Stop automatic looping and show a representative static frame with explicit status text.

reviewNotes.zh: 验证页面隐藏和离屏时暂停。
reviewNotes.en: Pause when the page is hidden or the element is offscreen.

reviewNotes.zh: 避免多个循环在同一视口竞争注意力。
reviewNotes.en: Prevent multiple loops from competing for attention in one viewport.
